title: Stabilize 2D area overlay depth order
description: 2D area overlays now render in a stable back-to-front order so zone is behind boundary, and boundary is behind subgraph.
decision_notes: Area box groups are ordered at SVG assembly time, so rendering is independent of checkbox or overlay argument order.
The depth order is layer bands, zone, boundary, then subgraph; later groups render visually in front.
Boxes within each group are ordered by declared/calculated depth so parent containers remain behind nested containers.
